name: Grant Test Deployer Roles
description: Iterates over every Zitadel project and binds all of its defined roles to the test-deployer machine user as UserGrants. Required so an OIDC access token issued for test-deployer carries the project-role claims, otherwise apps that enforce OIDC_REQUIRED_ROLE reject the dev-session login. Idempotent; safe to re-run after each new application deployment.

parameters.name: Zitadel Project ID
parameters.description: Internal Zitadel project ID emitted by 340-post-setup-deployer-in-zitadel. Must be declared as a parameter here so skip_if_all_missing can resolve to a real value; otherwise the check always sees NOT_DEFINED and the grant template is silently skipped.

parameters.name: Domain Suffix
parameters.description: Domain suffix for constructing external URLs
